name: Bobble
author: Poki
description: Get ready for a gravity-defying thrill ride in "Bobble"! Dive into the ultimate arcade challenge where precision meets chaos in a dazzling, fast-paced game of skill and strategy. Your mission? Clear all the pegs scattered across a dynamic, ever-shifting board. The board is packed with a variety of pegs, each with unique properties. Some bounce your ball with wild unpredictability, others grant you power-ups, and a few even alter the board’s layout in real time. As the game progresses, the pegs move and change, creating new challenges and strategic opportunities. "Bobble" is not just a test of luck; it’s a game of skill, timing, and quick thinking. Can you master the chaos and become the ultimate Bobble champion? Drop in and find out! How do I play Bobble? Use the mouse to aim, and then click with the Left Mouse Button to fire! Who created Bobble? Bobble is created by Winterpixel Games. Play their other game on Poki: Goober World ! How can I play Bobble for free? You can play Bobble for free on Poki. Can I play Bobble on mobile devices and desktop? Bobble can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
